---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for this project

---

## I would like to request/propose a feature

Remember that this library is independent from Telegram and we cannot add new features missing from Bot API

But we can eventually offer helper methods. Let us know what's on on your mind and please try to be specific.

You also can chat with us on Telegram [![@tgbot_chat](https://img.shields.io/badge/@tgbot__chat-Telegram-blue.svg)](https://t.me/tgbot_chat)
